common.tagline: Privacy-first link shortener on the edge

landing.title: Short links with geo, device & analytics built in
landing.subtitle: Create short links that route by country and device, gate behind a password, and stream every click into Analytics Engine — all on the edge with zero cold-start lookups.

stats.title: Built for the edge
stats.subtitle: No origin server, no cold starts — just fast redirects.

cta.title: Ready to shorten your first link?
cta.subtitle: Open the dashboard and create a link in seconds.

geo.title: Geo & device routing
geo.desc: Send visitors to different destinations by country or by Apple / Android device.

analytics.title: Edge analytics
analytics.desc: Every redirect is logged to Analytics Engine with geo, UA and referer dimensions.

privacy.title: Password & safety gates
privacy.desc: Protect links with a password or show an interstitial warning for unsafe destinations.

ai.title: AI slugs & OG
ai.desc: Generate readable slugs and social preview metadata with a single click.

realtime.title: Realtime globe
realtime.desc: Watch clicks land on a live WebGL globe with a streaming locations feed.

health.title: Link health checks
health.desc: Scan destinations for broken links and unsafe hosts, on demand or on write.

steps.title: From URL to insight in three steps
steps.subtitle: No origin server to manage — set up a link and start tracking.

create.title: Create a short link
create.desc: Paste a long URL and get a clean slug — or let AI suggest one for you.

route.title: Add routing & rules
route.desc: Route by country or device, gate behind a password, and set an expiry.

track.title: Share & track
track.desc: Every click streams into Analytics Engine — geo, device and referrer, live.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you might wonder before you create a link.

cost.a: Yes. Sink is open source (MIT) and runs on your own Cloudflare account — you only pay Cloudflare's usage, if any.

data.a: In your own Cloudflare D1 / Turso database and Analytics Engine. Nothing is sent to a third party.

geo.q: How does geo / device routing work?
geo.a: Each link can map countries or Apple / Android devices to different destinations, resolved at the edge with no cold start.

privacy.a: Only aggregated click analytics in your own account — no third-party trackers and no visitor cookies.

auth.a: The dashboard is gated by Google / GitHub sign-in, so only the accounts you allow can manage links.

footer.blurb: Short links with geo / device routing and edge analytics, running entirely on Cloudflare Workers.

login.description: Sign in to access the dashboard.
login.agreement: By continuing, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage your short links and view analytics.

overview.comingSoon: Link management and analytics arrive in the next phase.

links.title: Links
links.subtitle: Create and manage your short links.
links.searchPlaceholder: Search by slug, URL or comment…
links.empty: No links yet. Create your first one.

delete.title: Delete link?
delete.description: This will remove “{slug}”. This action cannot be undone.

form.subtitle: Configure the destination and advanced routing.
form.utmApplied: UTM parameters added to the URL
form.urlInvalid: The destination URL is not valid

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Traffic and engagement for your links.
analytics.notConfigured: Analytics is not configured. Set CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN to enable stats.

realtime.title: Realtime
realtime.subtitle: Live clicks as they happen.
realtime.notConfigured: Analytics is not configured. Set CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN to enable stats.

check.title: Health check
check.subtitle: Verify your links still resolve and are safe.
check.empty: Run a check to see results.

migrate.title: Migrate
migrate.subtitle: Back up, restore, and export your data.

export.title: Export links
export.description: Download all links as a JSON file.

import.title: Import links
import.description: Restore links from a previously exported JSON file. Existing slugs are skipped.

csv.title: Export access log
csv.description: Download per-link click stats as CSV.

backup.title: Backup to R2
backup.description: Snapshot all links to your R2 bucket.
backup.disabled: Enable R2 in wrangler.jsonc to use backups.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Switch between light and dark themes.
